title: Silver Jewelry iPhone Shots to White-Background E-commerce Set (JPEG + transparent PNG)
one_line_ask: Turn a handheld iPhone shot of a silver jewellery piece into a clean, colour-accurate, uniform-white e-commerce set: a 3000x3000 sRGB JPEG plus a matching transparent PNG, ready to slot straight into the online store.

issues: Very slight warm color cast present (acceptable per brief)
Faint soft shadow visible under ring (intentional)
Minor dust specks visible on sweep surface (intentional)
Background is off-white rather than pure white (intentional)
Ring is well-centered and sharply focused
Filigree scrollwork and bezel-set blue stone clearly rendered
Shallow depth of field consistent with iPhone macro
